intentSynonyms: look up a trace in datadog
fetch a single trace in datadog
view one specific trace in datadog
get a full apm trace by id in datadog
description: Get a full trace by trace ID from Datadog APM. Accepts either hex or decimal trace IDs. Returns all spans within the trace, including orphaned spans.

trace_id.description: Trace ID — accepts 32 hex characters (e.g., "abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890") or decimal digits
